query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalUsers, 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN hasRegistered = 1 THEN 1 END) as registeredUsers,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN hasRegistered = 0 THEN 1 END) as guestUsers
FROM users;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as totalUsers, 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN hasRegistered = 1 THEN 1 END) as registeredUsers,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN hasRegistered = 0 THEN 1 END) as guestUsers
FROM users;
